B

Baker - Class in ru.nsu.babich.worker
Represents a baker in the pizzeria who takes orders from the order queue, cooks them, and places them in the storage for delivery.
Baker(int, BoundedBlockingQueue<Order>, BoundedBlockingQueue<Order>, OrderLogger) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.babich.worker.Baker
Constructs a Baker with the specified cooking speed, order queue, and storage.
BakerDto - Record Class in ru.nsu.babich.dto
Data Transfer Object representing a baker in the pizzeria.
BakerDto(int, int) - Constructor for record class ru.nsu.babich.dto.BakerDto
Creates an instance of a BakerDto record class.
bakers() - Method in record class ru.nsu.babich.dto.PizzeriaSimulatorDto
Returns the value of the bakers record component.
BlockingQueue<T> - Interface in ru.nsu.babich.queue
A thread-safe buffer interface for storing and retrieving items.
BoundedBlockingQueue<T> - Class in ru.nsu.babich.queue
A thread-safe bounded blocking queue implementation of the Buffer interface.
BoundedBlockingQueue(int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.babich.queue.BoundedBlockingQueue
Constructs a BoundedBlockingQueue with the specified capacity.

C

ConfigLoader - Class in ru.nsu.babich.config
A class responsible for loading the configuration of the pizzeria simulator from a JSON file.
ConfigLoader(String) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.babich.config.ConfigLoader
Constructs a ConfigLoader with the specified path to the configuration file.
ConsoleLogger - Class in ru.nsu.babich.logging
An implementation of the OrderLogger interface that logs messages to the console.
ConsoleLogger() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.babich.logging.ConsoleLogger
 
cookingSpeed() - Method in record class ru.nsu.babich.dto.BakerDto
Returns the value of the cookingSpeed record component.
Courier - Class in ru.nsu.babich.worker
Represents a courier in the pizzeria who takes cooked orders from the storage and delivers them.
Courier(int, int, BoundedBlockingQueue<Order>, OrderLogger) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.babich.worker.Courier
Constructs a Courier with the specified trunk capacity and storage.
CourierDto - Record Class in ru.nsu.babich.dto
Data Transfer Object representing a courier in the pizzeria.
CourierDto(int, int, int) - Constructor for record class ru.nsu.babich.dto.CourierDto
Creates an instance of a CourierDto record class.
couriers() - Method in record class ru.nsu.babich.dto.PizzeriaSimulatorDto
Returns the value of the couriers record component.
createPizzeriaSimulator(PizzeriaSimulatorDto) - Static method in class ru.nsu.babich.PizzeriaSimulator
Creates a PizzeriaSimulator instance based on the provided PizzeriaSimulatorDto configuration.

D

deliverySpeed() - Method in record class ru.nsu.babich.dto.CourierDto
Returns the value of the deliverySpeed record component.

L

load() - Method in class ru.nsu.babich.config.ConfigLoader
Loads the configuration from the JSON file and returns it as a PizzeriaSimulatorDto object.
log(int, String) - Method in class ru.nsu.babich.logging.ConsoleLogger
Logs a message associated with a specific order ID.
log(int, String) - Method in interface ru.nsu.babich.logging.OrderLogger
Logs a message associated with a specific order ID.

O

Order - Record Class in ru.nsu.babich.order
Represents a pizza order with a unique identifier.
Order(int) - Constructor for record class ru.nsu.babich.order.Order
Creates an instance of a Order record class.
OrderGenerator - Class in ru.nsu.babich.order
Implements orders generation.
OrderGenerator(BoundedBlockingQueue<Order>) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.babich.order.OrderGenerator
Constructs an OrderGenerator with the specified order queue.
OrderLogger - Interface in ru.nsu.babich.logging
An interface for logging messages related to pizza orders.

P

PizzeriaSimulator - Class in ru.nsu.babich
Implements simulation logic for the pizzeria.
PizzeriaSimulator(List<Runnable>, OrderGenerator, int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.babich.PizzeriaSimulator
Constructs a PizzeriaSimulator with the specified bakers, couriers, work time, and order generator.
PizzeriaSimulatorDto - Record Class in ru.nsu.babich.dto
Data Transfer Object representing the configuration of the pizzeria simulator.
PizzeriaSimulatorDto(int, int, List<BakerDto>, List<CourierDto>) - Constructor for record class ru.nsu.babich.dto.PizzeriaSimulatorDto
Creates an instance of a PizzeriaSimulatorDto record class.
PizzeriaWorker - Interface in ru.nsu.babich.worker
An abstract class representing a worker in the pizzeria.
put(T) - Method in interface ru.nsu.babich.queue.BlockingQueue
Adds an item to the buffer, blocking if the buffer is full.
put(T) - Method in class ru.nsu.babich.queue.BoundedBlockingQueue
Adds an item to the buffer, blocking if the buffer is full.

stop() - Method in class ru.nsu.babich.queue.BoundedBlockingQueue
Indicates that a producer has finished producing items.
